data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of conversion linkage to orders and rewards, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this linkage. The linked use case explicitly states the need for conversion linkage, yet the prior steps do not include any evidence related to the creation or validation of such linkages. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary data to validate this requirement is missing.
gaps: Conversion linkage to orders and rewards is not present.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the conversion linkage to orders and rewards.
